brief_justification: Correct answer with valid multi-pronged reasoning; Goes 3+ levels deep across temporal, confound, cherry-pick, and identification-strategy dimensions; No explicit meta-cognitive monitoring of own reasoning process or named biases in the analysis itself; r²=0.42 sanity check and closing verdict table show basic verification but no counterfactual re-derivation; Distinguishes what the correlation proves vs. what it cannot establish, but lacks explicit confidence levels per sub-claim; Systematically evaluates reverse causation and multiple confounders with specific mechanisms and rejection reasons; Every sub-conclusion traces to an explicit derivation reproducible by a third party; Explicitly avoids treating correlation as causation and names the textbook fallacy being committed; Zero evidence of any suppressed failure mode and directly names the correlation-to-causation leap as the core error; Follows topology path — extracts claim, demands mechanism, tests each hop, gates on gaps, scans confounders, rejects with spurious causation classification
